feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Characteristics of solar differential rotation and activity during solar cycle No. 24
entry.content:
Authors: K Lončarić, I Poljančić Beljan, T Mihojević... - 17th European Solar Physics ...

Abstract: We present results of the behaviour of the solar differential rotation during solar cycle No. 24 derived from the Kanzelhöhe data set (Kanzelhöhe Observatory for Solar and Environmental Research, University of Graz, Austria). Sunspot groups and their ...

Alert: Astrid Veronig (author alert)

entry.title: Modulating Cross-Modal Convergence with Single-Stimulus, Intra-Modal Dispersion
entry.content:
Authors: EA Hosseini, B Cheung, E Fedorenko, AH Williams - ICLR 2026 Workshop on ...

Abstract: Neural networks exhibit a remarkable degree of representational convergence across diverse architectures, training objectives, and even data modalities. This convergence is predictive of alignment with brain representation. A recent hypothesis ...

Tags: brain

Alert: Evelina (Ev) Fedorenko (author alert)

entry.title: Reply to van Haastert: Local competition between Ras/actin-driven protrusions
entry.content:
Authors: A Alonso, JB Kirkegaard, RG Endres - Proceedings of the National Academy of ..., 2026

Abstract: We thank van Haastert for his thoughtful Letter regarding our recent PNAS paper on pseudopod-based chemotaxis strategies in shallow gradients (1). Our work is a conceptual model of how local, competing protrusive "options" can implement robust ...

Alert: Robert G Endres (author alert)

entry.title: Anesthesia Lowers Spatial Frequency Preference in the Primary Visual Cortex
entry.content:
Authors: J Wu, T Yoneda, K Robinson, N Tsuchiya, Y Yoshimura - eLife, 2026

Abstract: This study examined the impact of general anesthesia on visual processing in the mouse primary visual cortex (V1). By directly comparing visual responses in the same layer 2/3 neurons between the awake and anesthetized states, we found that ...

Alert: Naotsugu Tsuchiya (author alert)
